content:
IVX IA SELF-INDEPENDENT VARIABLE + TOOL UPGRADE

MISSION:
Make IVX IA independent from Rork using its own secure variables, own deployment tools, own QA tools, and own senior developer brain.

1. SECURE VARIABLE VAULT

Create IVX-owned secure variable system:

- IVX_GITHUB_TOKEN
- IVX_RENDER_API_KEY
- IVX_RENDER_SERVICE_ID
- IVX_SUPABASE_URL
- IVX_SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY
- IVX_AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID
- IVX_AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY
- IVX_VERCEL_TOKEN
- IVX_OWNER_TOKEN

Rules:
- Never print secrets.
- Test every credential before use.
- If missing, return exact variable name.
- If invalid, return exact HTTP error.

2. IVX TOOL ENGINE

Create tools:

- github.read
- github.write
- github.commit
- github.workflow
- render.status
- render.deploy
- render.logs
- render.rollback
- supabase.audit
- supabase.migrate
- supabase.read_write_test
- production.health
- production.version
- production.qa
- commit.match
- evidence.archive

3. SENIOR DEVELOPER BRAIN

For every task IVX must run:

THINK
INSPECT
PLAN
EXECUTE
TEST
DEPLOY
VERIFY
REPORT

No fake evidence.
No placeholders.
No “VERIFIED” without proof.

4. SELF-UPGRADE ENGINE

IVX must be able to:

- build new modules
- build new apps from scratch
- fix bugs
- add APIs
- add frontend screens
- run QA
- deploy
- verify production
- create rollback plan
- improve its own tools safely

5. TOP AI TECHNOLOGY SCANNER

Every day search and report:

- best AI developer tools
- deployment automation tools
- GitHub automation
- Render/Vercel/AWS automation
- Supabase automation
- AI coding agents
- security tools
- QA/testing tools
- real estate AI tools
- investor discovery tools

6. FINAL TEST

Verify:

GITHUB_WRITE:
RENDER_DEPLOY:
SUPABASE_WRITE:
AWS_ACCESS:
VERCEL_ACCESS:
CHAT_COMMANDS:
DEPLOY_COMMANDS:
QA_COMMANDS:
SELF_UPGRADE:
EVIDENCE_ARCHIVE:
24_7_REPORT:
FINAL_STATUS:

Allowed:
VERIFIED
FAILED
BLOCKED
UNVERIFIED

FINAL_STATUS = VERIFIED only when IVX can push code, deploy, test, verify, and produce live evidence without Rork.
